title_en: Master Student · AI4Rad Lab · Shenyang University of Technology
title_cn: 硕士研究生 · AI4Rad Lab · 沈阳工业大学
bio_en: Qiang Sun is a master's student at Shenyang University of Technology and a member of AI4Rad Lab. His research focuses on artificial intelligence in medical imaging, including deformable medical image registration, multi-organ segmentation, longitudinal and multi-phase abdominal CT analysis, and quantitative assessment of tumor treatment response.
bio_cn: 孙强是沈阳工业大学硕士研究生，AI4Rad Lab 成员。研究方向聚焦医学影像人工智能，具体包括医学图像可变形配准、多器官分割、纵向与多时相腹部 CT 分析，以及肿瘤治疗疗效的定量评估。
interests_en: Medical image registration and multi-organ segmentation
Longitudinal and multi-phase abdominal CT analysis
Quantitative assessment of tumor treatment response
interests_cn: 医学图像配准与多器官分割
纵向与多时相腹部 CT 分析
肿瘤治疗疗效的定量评估
